tasks.title: Audit every app for module splitting
tasks.description: Inspect each app against docs/artifex/19-project-file-contracts.md and confirm large monolith files are split into editable modules with clear responsibilities.

tasks.title: Audit and reduce patch layers
tasks.description: Check every app for active patch/override/hotfix files. No app should run more than two active patch layers; patches must be integrated, converted to normal helpers, removed, or archived as non-live reference.

tasks.title: Apply standard header and Module menu
tasks.description: Every app should use the standard header order: logo/app title, version pill, vertical divider, main menu. Every app should expose the shared Module menu order: Hub, Creation Guide, Project Editor, Scene Editor, Quest Builder, Puzzle Creator, Effect Editor, Archetype Object Creator.

tasks.title: Check required reference files before app edits
tasks.description: Before changing any Artifex app, inspect docs/artifex/18-color-and-display-rules.md for branding/display rules and docs/artifex/19-project-file-contracts.md for folder, ownership, saving and draft rules. Also inspect docs/artifex/19a-project-starter-file-schemas.md when starter/project JSON is involved, docs/artifex/20-asset-intake-workflow.md when source assets or intake are involved, docs/artifex/21-template-game-project-contract.md when reference-project integration is involved, and the shared todo guide/task list for platform work.

tasks.title: Use Module as a File menu flyout
tasks.description: The File menu should not list every module inline. It should contain a Module item that opens a side flyout listing only core modules: Hub, Creation Guide, Project Editor, Scene Editor, Quest Builder, Puzzle Creator, Effect Editor, Archetype Object Creator. Utility tools must not appear in this core module flyout. Effect Editor has this in V3.19; remaining apps still need the same shared pattern.

tasks.title: Standardize version and cache keys
tasks.description: Every app should show a visible version number beside the title and increment it by 0.01 per edit. The same version must be reflected in the page title, visible badge, stylesheet cache key, script/module cache key, and loaded/fallback text where present.

tasks.title: Standardize remembered editor layout state
tasks.description: Apps with draggable windows, resizable panels, zoom/pan controls, collapsible cards, or horizontal/vertical view toggles should persist those layout preferences in localStorage using an app-specific key. Each app should also expose a Reset Saved Layout command in View where relevant.

tasks.title: Define shared app shell file structure
tasks.description: Each core app should keep index.html as a shell and split behaviour into clear files such as module config, schema/contracts, block/type definitions, layout state, UI bindings, renderer/view logic, dialogs, validation, and export. Avoid one giant script or random feature logic in unrelated files.

tasks.title: Audit app colours against branding/display rules
tasks.description: Every app should be checked against docs/artifex/18-color-and-display-rules.md before UI changes. App accent colours should not overwhelm the dark charcoal base, and shared visual elements should remain consistent across the Artifex suite.

tasks.title: Audit app file ownership and save behaviour against project file contracts
tasks.description: Every app import/save/output path must be checked against docs/artifex/19-project-file-contracts.md and, where it authors project JSON, the canonical schemas in docs/artifex/19a-project-starter-file-schemas.md. Each app must declare what it owns, reads, writes, must not own, whether its changes are saved to the connected project folder or only localStorage, and how it blocks navigation when unsaved local-only edits exist.

tasks.title: Create shared project reference index
tasks.description: Define and generate a real project reference index that lets apps show where an asset, archetype object, gameplay action, FX archetype, scene, quest, or route is referenced. Archetype Object Creator Step 5 needs this so its Reference panel can list actual scenes, quests, and object/action usages instead of fake placeholder links.

tasks.title: Create shared Portal endpoint registry and cross-app linking contract
tasks.description: Portal is a project-wide endpoint mechanic, not a Maze-only paired teleporter. Define connections/portal-registry.json inside the connected project root with stable portal IDs, owning resource/local placement, visual asset/effect references, destination links, one-way/two-way behaviour and optional conditions. Puzzle Creator and Scene Editor create/place endpoints; Quest Builder references or activates them; Project Editor displays and validates the project-wide connection graph; Build Game and Health Guide report unresolved or broken links.

tasks.title: Make every app actually open the active project
tasks.description: Hub and Creation Guide set artifex.activeProjectId and artifex.projectLibrary, but each app must also load the active connected project's real owned files and indexes, update visible project/save state, and avoid falling back to unrelated default/demo data when an active project is available.

tasks.title: Complete shared connected project-folder service adoption
tasks.description: The initial shared project-folder client/initializer is now used by Creation Guide V1.1.11. Complete the normal project data workflow across remaining apps: persist/re-authorise directory handles, read and write registered relative files, expose consistent folder/save state, and ensure project files never store private absolute paths or handles.

tasks.title: Implement local draft versus project-file save status
tasks.description: Retain localStorage autosave as a recovery layer, but show whether content is Saved to Project Folder, Local Draft Only, Project File Changed, Conflict, Permission Required, No Folder Connected or Save Failed. Compare local drafts against real connected files using hashes and readable timestamps. localStorage is never the permanent source of truth.

tasks.title: Prompt before leaving an app with local-only changes
tasks.description: When a user leaves an authoring app while changes are only in localStorage, block navigation and state clearly that the work is only located in local storage at present and has not been written to the project folder. Offer Save and Continue, Stay Here, Continue Without Saving after explicit confirmation, and Export Backup when no writable folder is connected or permission is unavailable.

tasks.title: Audit real project-folder data before build
tasks.description: Extend Project Audit and Build validation to check connected-folder permission/write status, local drafts not saved to project files, externally changed files/conflicts, missing registered paths, broken IDs/references, duplicate IDs, unused assets and outdated backup/build metadata. Audit warns and reports; it must not silently overwrite conflicts.

tasks.title: Build and validate the Template Game connected reference project
tasks.description: After required apps can read/write one connected project, build a tiny populated Template Game using the canonical hierarchy and schemas. It must prove cross-app references with a title/start screen, playable scene, structural route, registered final assets, object/effect references, minimal quest/puzzle coverage where included, and honest health/build validation. This Template Game is separate from Artifacts Adventures production work.

tasks.title: Add Creation Guide connected project-folder controls
tasks.description: Implemented in Creation Guide V1.1.11 and browser-tested: Project Folder access, Connect Project Folder, Re-authorise Folder, visible status and Create Starter Structure integration use the shared service foundation. Keep under review until full shared save-state/draft handling exists across apps.

tasks.title: Initialise canonical project files and folders
tasks.description: Implemented in Creation Guide V1.1.11 and tested for initial disk writes. Canonical schema alignment is loaded for newly created files; fresh-folder validation remains advisable and the blank-project startScreenId null rule is tracked separately.

tasks.title: Stop blank starter projects referencing a missing start screen
tasks.description: A Blank Starter Project currently creates empty screen indexes while starter project/logic data can point at screen_title_main. Change the blank initializer so it uses startScreenId: null until an actual screen is created or a populated Template Game provides a valid registered start screen. Requires an approved runtime change and fresh-folder test.

tasks.title: Add Initial Asset Intake Setup section
tasks.description: Add a visible Project Overview setup section explaining that intake/ is the source-material staging area, not final assets. Show what belongs in backgrounds, characters, objects, icons-ui, music and dialogue-sfx; provide Create Intake Folders and Skip for Now; and create intake/README.md plus the six buckets in the connected project folder when approved.

tasks.title: Add Recommended Starting Media checklist
tasks.description: Create a non-blocking setup/readiness section for project logo/title mark, at least one background, player-character asset, NPC asset, interactable object/pickup, transition object and UI/icon placeholder set. It should report readiness and generate actions without making permanent project references to intake source files.

tasks.title: Support project logo identity and display
tasks.description: Allow a project logo or temporary title mark to begin through intake/icons-ui, be promoted through the final asset workflow, store only the final asset-relative path in project metadata, and display the logo beside the project title in Creation Guide and project selectors where practical.

tasks.title: Extend Health for folder, intake and media readiness
tasks.description: Extend Creation Guide Health to report full folder permission/save state, unsaved local drafts, missing/skipped intake setup, missing recommended starting media, invalid final project-logo references and related actionable fix assignments. Reuse shared Health Guide checks rather than duplicating long-term health logic.

tasks.title: Add Template Game new-project choice
tasks.description: Once the populated Template Game connected reference project exists and passes its cross-app proof checklist, add it as a New Project choice alongside Blank Starter Project and Open Existing Project. Do not present Artifacts Adventures as the Template Game or expose this option before validation succeeds.

tasks.title: Move Creation Guide checks toward shared Health Guide
tasks.description: As the shared health-guide system matures, replace duplicated app-only setup checks with shared checks displayed in Creation Guide as setup/readiness progress, while retaining Creation Guide-specific UI and assignment generation.

tasks.title: Stabilise Project Manager shell
tasks.description: Confirm the current Project Editor shell remains usable after contract alignment: version pill placement, Module menu, dropdown close behaviour, Asset Browser, Return to Flatplan, Getting Started Wizard, draggable inspector, zoom, pan and node dragging.

tasks.title: Create shared Health Guide folder
tasks.description: Create artifex/shared/health-guide/ with README and shared health-check code so Project Manager, Creation Guide, and Build Game can use the same diagnostics.

tasks.title: Move setup checks into shared Health Guide
tasks.description: Move Getting Started Wizard checks for project.json, input-map.json, library-links.json, start screen, nodes, routes, linked scenes/screens, orphaned nodes, missing quest/puzzle/archetype/effect links, and gameplay action mappings into shared health-checks.js.

tasks.title: Reconnect Getting Started Wizard to shared checks
tasks.description: Update Project Manager so the wizard imports shared Health Guide checks and only displays the shared report instead of owning health logic internally.

tasks.title: Prepare Creation Guide to reuse Health Guide
tasks.description: Document or add a light integration point so Creation Guide can later import the same shared Health Guide checks and display them as setup/milestone progress.

tasks.title: Define real project package import/export
tasks.description: Project Editor should work with canonical split files: project.json, logic.json, layout.json, registry.json, library-links.json, input-map.json, health/latest-health-report.json and todos/project-manager-todos.json. Its current backup/schema output is aligned, but once folder service integration exists, Save must write owned files directly to the connected project root while export remains backup/fallback.

tasks.title: Add Project Editor connected-folder open flow
tasks.description: Wire Connect/Open Project Folder, Re-authorise Project Folder and fallback Import Project Files so canonical split project files populate Project Editor state from the actual connected project root rather than unrelated browser/demo state.

tasks.title: Add Project Editor direct-save and backup export flow
tasks.description: Wire Save Current Project and Save All through the shared connected-folder service so owned split files write directly to the selected project root. Retain Export Backup ZIP for archive, transfer and no-permission fallback rather than as the normal save route.

tasks.title: Make Asset Browser read real indexes
tasks.description: Replace placeholder cards with real data from quest, sidequest, scene, screen, puzzle, object archetype, effect archetype and asset indexes.

tasks.title: Add link-to-selected-node behaviour
tasks.description: From Asset Browser, selecting a scene, quest, puzzle, archetype, effect or asset should link it to the selected Flatplan node or route where valid.

tasks.title: Improve inspector per node type
tasks.description: Inspector should change fields based on selected scene node, quest node, puzzle gate, route, condition, lock, branch and completion requirement.

tasks.title: Make Stitcher routes real
tasks.description: Define and edit route types: simple, branch, quest-gated, puzzle-gated, item-gated, flag/condition and completed-state routes.

tasks.title: Move Build Prep to shared Health Guide
tasks.description: Build Prep should become a Project Editor view of the shared health system, with Creation Guide showing setup progress and Build Game showing final packaging readiness.

tasks.title: Generate project-manager to-do output
tasks.description: Project Editor should generate todos/project-manager-todos.json with missing setup, broken links, invalid routes and fix-owner fields.

tasks.title: Audit Project Editor against split and patch rules
tasks.description: Inspect project-ui.js, project-integration-ui.js and project-app.v7.js before adding too much more. Split files before they become too large and do not stack patches.

tasks.title: Design Project Editor task browser workspace
tasks.description: Implement/display generated project-manager tasks through a visible Project Tasks or To-Do Board workspace with date/generated-at, title, description, status, priority, owner/module, source check, detail panel, filters and node-specific inspector behaviour.

tasks.title: Final QA Effect Editor display panel
tasks.description: Continue after V3.19: verify the bottom Display panel no longer overlaps diagnostics, keep it to a clean 3-column icon grid, remove duplicate underlay/load icons, keep Guides icon-only, and confirm Pause/Snapshot plus Zoom controls stay correctly positioned in the view area. The Effect Editor File > Module flyout was completed in V3.19, so this item is now only the final visual QA/fix pass for Display and view controls.

tasks.title: Rescale Effect Editor runtime physics controls
tasks.description: Normalise gravity and speed so the controls are intuitive and consistent. Gravity should use a user-facing scale where 100 approximates earth/downward gravity, 0 is neutral, negative values rise, and the current tiny decimal values are hidden behind mapping logic. Speed Min/Max should visually match the actual canvas movement and very low speeds such as 0.1-0.3 should render slowly instead of still appearing fast.

tasks.title: Complete Text effect runtime and controls
tasks.description: Finish the text effect after V3.18. Implement real text spawn delay, decouple Text Density from normal particle Density, prevent monospace/font choices from locking the screen, support multiline rendering with line spacing and block width/wrap logic, and add cleanup controls for direction, reveal mode, scatter, keep block together and lifetime bias. The normal Density control should remain visually disabled/greyed when a text layer uses the text-specific density.

tasks.title: Build missing real FX engines
tasks.description: Add the real engine layer needed for advanced effects: smoke/cloud/mist/fog, spark/ember, electric arc/lightning, ribbon/trail, tornado/vortex/swirl, beam/laser, projectile/fireball, lens flare compositor, true heat distortion/heat warping, convex and concave distortion warps, liquid/blob/black-oil, rain and broader weather effects, shockwave/radial burst and sprite-sheet/flipbook FX. Each engine should declare its Effect Specific Controls and export/import schema fields.

tasks.title: Run visual quality pass on built-in effect presets
tasks.description: Review and polish built-in presets after the new engines are stable. Electric Arc should look like electricity; Shockwave and Radial Burst naming/behaviour should stay correct; Heat Distortion should warp an underlay; Optic Glint and True Lens Flare should be distinct; radial burst should support once/loop/continuous with functioning pulse/delay controls.

tasks.title: Finish Effect Editor brush, overlay and icon asset loaders
tasks.description: Finish the real asset loading layer. Brushes should auto-load from artifex/apps/effect-editor/brushes with square thumbnails and correct transparency. Lens-flare overlays should auto-load from artifex/apps/effect-editor/overlays. Insert menu icons should read from artifex/apps/effect-editor/effect-icons instead of placeholder emoji boxes. Longer term, connect this to the shared asset library.

tasks.title: Integrate V3 polish layers into normal Effect Editor modules
tasks.description: The current V3 Effect Editor is working but still imports layered polish modules from the split/reapply process. After behaviour stabilises, fold v312/v314/v315/v317 polish logic into normal named modules or helpers, remove stale patch-style files from the active import chain and archive dead files.

tasks.title: Add Effect Library browser with thumbnails
tasks.description: Create an Effect Library browser for saved FX archetypes that displays visual thumbnails/previews, names, tags and engine types; supports selecting/opening an effect for editing; and later reads/writes the canonical connected-project effect index rather than relying only on demo or browser-local state.

tasks.title: Add visible Save action to Effect Archetype Assets
tasks.description: Add an obvious Save control within the Effect Archetype Assets left card for saving the current FX archetype. It must show save status and ultimately write the owned effect record/index through the connected project-folder service, while preserving export/backup as a separate fallback rather than pretending browser-local state is a saved project asset.

tasks.title: Add emitter width and degree-range visual guides
tasks.description: Add visible stage guides for particle emission controls: brace-style { } marker guides showing emitter/spawn width, and a cone guide centred on the direction arrow showing the selected Degree Range emission area. Guides must update live as values change, be hidden when Guides are disabled, and accurately reflect Lock Direction, Within Degree Range and Random Rotation modes.
